title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. sphaerocranum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. sphaerocranum is a subspecies of the Hieracium nigrescens plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is also known as a type of hawkweed and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. sphaerocranum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, and it can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
